articles.title: Fenris Bakarr
articles.description: Fenris Bakarr is an advance scout operative working for the Aegis security organisation.

articles.title: Ajax
articles.description: Ajax of Kastorio is a legendary Spartan lochagos and warrior, responsible for recruiting and training.

articles.title: The Executioner
articles.description: Check out the ass on this one

articles.title: Gluttonite
articles.description: Gluttonites (anthropophogorus voracitus) are a subspecies of human, categorised by their extraordinary size, strength and apetite.

articles.title: Aegis
articles.description: Aegis is a covert humanitarian logistics contractor and security organisation, which is unofficially alleged to provide clandestine protection and combat support.
